_meta.reviewNotes: English is the canonical source for this site.

nav.languageSelectorFooter: Translations in review for some content. English is the canonical version.

translationStatus.underReviewBanner: This page was machine-translated from English. A native reviewer has not yet approved this translation. The English original is canonical.
translationStatus.approvedBanner: This translation has been reviewed by a native speaker.
translationStatus.feedbackPrompt: If you are a native speaker and notice issues, you can suggest corrections by opening an issue on the project repository.

notFound.label: Out of the training distribution
notFound.title: We didn't learn that page.
notFound.body: The address you tried isn't one of the rooms we built. The three that exist — Mirror, Music, Cross-Cultural — are linked below.

error.label: Something didn't resolve
error.title: The model lost its line for a moment.
error.body: A part of the page failed to render. The persistent brain is still here, in the background, breathing. Try the room again — or step into another one.
